summary: EXP-426 closes the third-option dome-defender retreat in SEC-6.13 via a single-paragraph insertion (~187 words) after the existing two-options framing. The retreat — galaxies as 2D illusory firmament patterns whose photon properties produce RAR-shaped curves — is folded into a sharpened option (B): the measurement probes the illusion-generation mechanism, not 3D extragalactic physics, and so cannot confirm the MOND-community framings (Milgromian dynamics, NFW profiles, standard cosmology) the imported WINs rely on for legitimacy. Cross-references per-WIN dilemma framing at data/wins.json:WIN-052 detail_extra. Closes ISS-2113 (SEC-6.13.h3 moderate). Counter-argument considered and rejected ("close the issue as accept-as-is, the per-WIN treatment already handles it") — a reader landing on Part 6.13 may not open WIN-052 detail; the section-level prose deserves the closure in print.
